description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a linux:build job in the build stage that runs the shell command `echo ''`, and a mac:build job in the same stage with the same command. Add four test jobs—linux:rspec, linux:rubocop, mac:rspec, and mac:rubocop—each in the test stage and each executing `echo ''`. Add a production job in the deploy stage that also runs `echo ''`. Do not specify any Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules.
